A letter for you

Happiest birthday to my gorgeous princess 👸🏻🎂💞

Henguu ottige iratth ala matth "be happy" hange hinge heludilla — coz I know you're happy with me 😏😎

Cheers to 19 years on this earth 🥂✨

You're my comfort zone — the one thing that lifts my mood in any situation, no matter what, is youh, babe 🫠

I can't describe my love, care and affection for you — and it's never gonna fade away. ♾️

I love youh soo mucch 💋🎀

— always yours 🌹
